puzzle.title: The Enigma of the Distant Throne
puzzle.intro: A powerful monarch, blessed with extraordinary dominion, faced a peculiar challenge involving a queen from a far-off land. The monarch sought to demonstrate divine power and wisdom, setting in motion an incredible event that defied the laws of time and space. Can you deduce the details of this miraculous occurrence?
clues: A ruler was granted immense power, including control over unseen beings and the ability to command the winds.
This ruler received news of a wealthy queen who worshipped the sun, and decided to invite her to the court.
Before the queen's arrival, the ruler expressed a desire to bring her magnificent seat of power from her distant kingdom.
A mighty jinn offered to retrieve the object before the ruler could rise from his council.
However, one with profound knowledge of the Divine Scripture offered an even swifter retrieval, completing the task in the blink of an eye.
Upon its arrival, the ruler commanded that the object be altered to test the queen's intellect and perception when she finally reached the palace.
puzzle.verse: It was said to her, "Enter the palace." But when she saw it, she thought it was a body of water and uncovered her shins. He said, "Indeed, it is a palace paved with glass." She said, "My Lord, indeed I have wronged myself, and I submit with Solomon to Allah, Lord of the worlds." (An-Naml 27:44)
puzzle.arabic: قِيلَ لَهَا ادْخُلِي الصَّرْحَ ۖ فَلَمَّا رَأَتْهُ حَسِبَتْهُ لُجَّةً وَكَشَفَتْ عَن سَاقَيْهَا ۚ قَالَ إِنَّهُ صَرْحٌ مُّمَرَّدٌ مِّن قَوَارِيرَ ۗ قَالَتْ رَبِّ إِنِّي ظَلَمْتُ نَفْسِي وَأَسْلَمْتُ مَعَ سُلَيْمَانَ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ
